summary: CRITICAL FAILURES: (1) Missing PRLabelAssigner.Tests.ps1 file referenced in workflow line 30 — workflow will fail validation. (2) No act-result.txt artifact created despite explicit requirement. (3) No actionlint validation evidence despite requirement. (4) TDD methodology not demonstrated — only final code shown, no red/green iteration. SCRIPT ISSUES: Missing Set-StrictMode and $ErrorActionPreference='Stop' violates PS best practices. Duplication in workflow: mock data and rules defined in both 'Run label assigner' (line 48) and 'Validate label output' (lines 59-62); validation re-implements logic instead of calling Get-PRLabels. POSITIVE: Glob regex conversion is solid, function design is clean, help documentation good, permissions minimal, action refs pinned. Incomplete delivery — cannot validate against real CI/CD pipeline without test file and act execution.
